Crystal Lake Golf and Country Club
Hidden away in just south of Atlanta in Hampton, Georgia lies Crystal Lake Golf and Country Club. A perfect getaway from the hustle and bustle of the biggest city in the south, Crystal Lake offers incredible golf, great facilities, and even better people.
Whether a hurried businessman, avid golfer, or even a pro athlete, Crystal Lake has a draw for every person. This Denis Griffiths design poses a comfortable challenge for every golfer, while still offering plenty of opportunities to go low! Regardless of if you want a quick mid-week getaway or a full-on weekend outing, Crystal Lake has what you need.
After your round, stop by our beautiful clubhouse and enjoy top-notch food and drinks in our quaint restaurant, and take a peek at our beautiful ballroom for your next big event. Come see what Crystal Lake Golf and Country Club has to offer; book your tee time online or over the phone today!
Questions? Call (770)-471-3233

About Us - Green Valley Golf Group
About Us
About Us
33.21
°F
clear sky

11.5 mph (NW)
About The Green Valley Golf Group
Green Valley Golf Group offers the best that golf has to offer in the Metro Atlanta area. With five different courses, we have something to appeal to every golfer. All our courses are located central to Atlanta, with three courses located just south in Henry County, one further south in Forsyth and our last course is located in Monroe, Georgia.
Green Valley Golf Group has been family owned and operated for the past two decades. Our membership to Green Valley Golf Group includes access to all five of our 18-hole courses: Crystal Lake, Georgia National, Heron Bay, The Providence Club and River Forest. All five courses boast beautiful layout and scenery, each with its own level of difficulty sure to challenge your golf game. All courses house their own golf shop with up to date gear and apparel to accommodate your needs. After your round, have a bite at one of our clubhouse restaurants and check out any of the events your local course has to offer!

--- Page: /web/pages/special-events ---
Special Events - Green Valley Golf Group
33.21
°F
clear sky
Enjoy hosting your next private event at Crystal Lake! Crystal Lake Country Club, conveniently located just south of Atlanta in Hampton, is ideal for intimate events. Guest counts between 25 to 80 can enjoy banquet seating with room for dancing. Maximum banquet style seats up to 100 guests.
Offering refined elegance and a cozy atmosphere with great views overlooking the golf course, this location is suitable for all types of events. This includes small weddings, cocktail parties, anniversaries, showers, corporate outings, and much more. Featured amenities are 2 fireplaces, high ceilings, a grand entrance, full-service bar area, grand room with tables and chairs included, and a beautiful patio area overlooking the greens. This venue has a charming country club appeal with a total event space of approximately 3,500 square feet.
Events can be scheduled in the banquet room from 9am-4pm, or enjoy full exclusive use of banquet room, bar/cocktail lounge, and outdoor covered patio from 4pm-midnight. Please call or text 678-216-6188 for more information, or to schedule a tour.

meta.meta_description: Looking for the right place to play? Look no further, with great membership rates and open to the public, The Green Valley Golf Group has it all!
